# Warrantee.io - Trust the Terms

> Bilingual warranty management platform for the Middle East

## About

Warrantee.io is a SaaS warranty management platform that helps businesses, sellers, and consumers manage product warranties digitally. It supports Arabic (RTL) and English, warranty tracking, claims management, seller onboarding, public verification, certificates, and integrations.

## Pricing Summary

- Free plan: no credit card required, up to 10 warranties, one user, basic dashboard, and email support.
- Professional launch offer: $1/month, first month free, unlimited warranties, up to 5 team members, advanced analytics, custom workflows, bilingual certificates, and priority support.
- Enterprise: custom pricing for larger teams, custom integrations, account management, advanced security, and SLA support.

## Features

- Digital warranty registration and tracking
- Warranty expiry notifications (30/15/7 days)
- Claims management workflow
- Seller dashboard and invitation system
- Bilingual support (Arabic RTL + English LTR)
- Email-to-warranty auto-booking
- ERP integration via REST API
- Warranty chain and transfer management
- PDF warranty certificates
- Public warranty verification/lookup
- Data export (CSV/PDF)

- FAQ: https://warrantee.io/en/faq

## Machine Discovery

- Sitemap: https://warrantee.io/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://warrantee.io/robots.txt
- API catalog: https://warrantee.io/.well-known/api-catalog
- Agent card: https://warrantee.io/.well-known/agent-card.json
- Agent skills: https://warrantee.io/.well-known/agent-skills
- MCP card: https://warrantee.io/.well-known/mcp.json

## Access Boundaries

- Public pages are crawlable and localized under `/en` and `/ar`.
- Account dashboards, warranty records, claims, billing, settings, and seller workspaces require authentication.
- API routes under `/api/` are not public crawling targets.
- Do not infer private warranty data from public documentation.

## Contact

- Email: hello@warrantee.io
- Website: https://warrantee.io

## Version

v1.0.0 - Phase 1
